overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a dark cloak walking along a coastal trail toward ancient castle ruins. The overcast autumn setting features muted colors, tall grasses, and rocky cliffs, with the path eventually opening to reveal a misty ocean coastline.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow dirt path between rock cliff and tall grass leading to castle ruins

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the path toward the castle ruins visible ahead on the hill

entered.detail: tall moss-covered stone cliff face flanking the left side of the path
ancient stone castle ruins perched atop a grassy hill in the distance
tall green and yellow grasses lining the right side of the trail
bushes with red and orange autumn foliage scattered along the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail flanked by a tall rock cliff on the left and tall grasses with autumn-colored bushes on the right. Ahead, ancient castle ruins sit atop a hill, growing larger as the character approaches through the overcast landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal trail with first view of ocean and cliff edge

events.description: castle ruins pass out of view to the left as the path curves toward the coast revealing the ocean
character drops down a small ledge to a lower section of the cliff path

agents.ego_description: turning left away from the castle and toward the coastal cliff edge as the ocean comes into view

entered.detail: vast grey ocean visible in the distance beyond the coastal cliffs
purple flowering heather bushes lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path opens up as the castle ruins fade from view behind the character. The trail curves left toward the coast, revealing a sweeping view of the grey ocean and rocky shoreline ahead. The character drops down a small ledge onto a lower section of the cliff path.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff path overlooking the ocean with rocky tide pools below

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cliff edge path overlooking the waves and rocky coastline below

entered.detail: jagged rocks and tide pools visible along the shoreline below the cliff
tall rock formations rising from the ocean water in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the rugged coastal cliff path with the ocean stretching out to the horizon. Misty sea stacks rise from the water while waves crash against the rocky coastline below. The terrain is windswept with sparse vegetation as the path follows the cliff edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a narrow inland trail toward a vast, windswept coastal vista. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path flanked by a towering rock cliff and autumn-colored bushes, moving steadily toward ancient castle ruins perched atop a distant hill. As the character passes the ruins, the trail curves left and the landscape opens up, shifting the focus from the stone structures to a sweeping view of the grey ocean and rocky shoreline. The camera then follows the character as they drop down a small ledge onto a lower cliff path, where the terrain becomes more rugged and sparse. Finally, the scene expands to reveal a wide horizon of misty sea stacks and crashing waves as the path clings to the edge of the precipice.
